name: The Farmer Wants a Wife
overview: City meets the country in this fun-filled Australian series. Follow six lonely farmers on the road to romance as they choose between hundreds of prospective partners. Prepare for tears, joy, and jealousy, all in a heart-warming journey to find a wife. Hosted by Natalie Gruzlewski.

trailers.title: The Farmer Wants A Wife Australia 2011 - Channel Nine
